mapper.select: SELECT b.id AS blogId, b.title AS title, b.coverImg AS coverImg, b.userId AS userId, u.username AS authorName, u.avatarUrl AS authorAvatarUrl, b.thumbCount AS thumbCount, COUNT(t.id) AS weeklyThumbCount FROM thumb t JOIN blog b ON t.blogId = b.id LEFT JOIN user u ON b.userId = u.id WHERE t.createTime >= #{since} GROUP BY b.id, b.title, b.coverImg, b.userId, u.username, u.avatarUrl, b.thumbCount ORDER BY weeklyThumbCount DESC, b.thumbCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT #{userId} AS userId, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM blog WHERE userId = #{userId}), 0) AS blogCount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(thumbCount) FROM blog WHERE userId = #{userId}), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite f JOIN blog b ON b.id = f.blogId WHERE b.userId = #{userId}), 0) AS likedAndCollectedCount
